title: oenothera tetragona var. fraseri
intro: Oenothera tetragona var. fraseri, also known as the Fraser's evening primrose, is a perennial plant native to the western regions of North America. This plant contains high levels of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which is known for its anti-inflammatory and medicinal properties. The Fraser's evening primrose is used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of health conditions, including eczema, arthritis, and menstrual cramps, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Oenothera tetragona var. fraseri can be found in the form of capsules, oil, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural health benefits.
